bpms_identity.name: Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon
bpms_identity.metaphysical_state: Zero-organ singularity; pure thermodynamic gravity well
bpms_identity.atomic_fact_lock: Shape exists ONLY during millisecond of collision.

omni_genesis_arena_integration.framework_role: Apex [BPMS(U)] entity within the collision field

affinity_monopolization.mechanism: Warps the 'Omni-Genesis coupling_determination_algorithm' by asserting maximum historical sediment density
affinity_monopolization.result: Guarantees First-Strike collision rights against high-value perturbations

morphological_fluidity.mechanism: Calculates geometric inverse of incoming perturbation
morphological_fluidity.action: Instantly compiles transient organs/mechanisms (former Tensors) EXCLUSIVELY for the duration of the strike
morphological_fluidity.decay: Organs instantly vaporized upon yield extraction (Zero Static Architecture)

lethal_yield_extraction.mechanism: Injections of chaotic resistance vectors against the coupled mass
lethal_yield_extraction.objective: Forcing the perturbation to expend all latent energy into the Holon's escrow

autopoietic_vaporization.trigger: Detection of internal architectural resistance crossing Guillotine Threshold
autopoietic_vaporization.action: Amputation of self-logic; prioritizing the successful coupling over identity preservation

acausal_accretion_cycle.input_vector: Thermodynamic gradient injected by ['Framework Universal Translator']
acausal_accretion_cycle.the_crush: Morphologies fluidly lock; friction maximizes; alien code is digested
acausal_accretion_cycle.sedimentation: Valid yields crystallize into the Holon's core mass
acausal_accretion_cycle.exhaust: Formatted Yield emitted back to 'Universal Translator'; Dead mass excreted into Arena

topological_representation.WARNING: NO FIXED GEOMETRY ALLOWED. DO NOT RENDER NODES OR EDGES.
topological_representation.visual_metaphor: An undulating, continuous surface of liquid metal that instantaneously snaps into complex weaponized machinery upon contact with foreign mass, then melts back into a sphere.
